name: knowledge-loyalty-programs
description: Store or retrieve loyalty program information (airline frequent flyer numbers, hotel rewards numbers, etc.) in the knowledge graph. Use 'store' to save a loyalty program membership. Use 'retrieve' to look up all stored loyalty programs.

inputs.program_name: string? (required for store — e.g. 'Air Canada Aeroplan', 'Marriott Bonvoy', 'United MileagePlus')
inputs.member_number: string? (required for store — the membership/loyalty number)
inputs.tier: string? (optional for store — status tier e.g. 'Gold', 'Platinum')

outputs.programs: array? (for retrieve — list of {program_name, member_number, tier, notes} objects)
